text: Being here, I am struck by an atmosphere of thoughtful innovation and forward-looking curiosity. The transparent conference room evokes a sense of anticipation, as if awaiting a meeting of minds, while the vibrant, artful wall dedicated to R+D reminds me of the constant human drive to explore, improve, and collaborate. I feel a quiet excitement, mingled with an awareness of the structures—visible and invisible—that shape our collective endeavors.
